response.justification: While Bogdan is clearly a skilled full-stack engineer with strong software craftsmanship practices and excellent communication abilities, he lacks the two fundamental requirements for this role: deep C++ expertise on Windows (only ~6 months mentioned at National Instruments) and any financial services or capital markets domain knowledge. His 20-year career has been entirely in web, mobile, GIS, and advertising technology with no exposure to fixed income, investment banking, or financial systems.
strengths: Demonstrated mastery of software engineering principles including TDD, CI/CD, and mentoring (multiple workshops and talks)
Excellent communication skills evidenced by teaching experience, technical writing, and clear resume presentation
Proven ability to rapidly acquire new technologies and domains across diverse platforms (web, mobile, embedded, GIS)
concerns: Minimal C++ development experience (6 months at National Instruments) versus mandatory 5-10 years requirement
No Windows platform development mentioned; recent career focused on web/mobile/Linux environments
Complete absence of financial services, fixed income, derivatives, or capital markets domain exposure
